0: An unsettling number of women have been reported
missing as of late. Hunters sent to investigate
discovered the [Color:0x5]kidnapped women[Color:0x0] were taken to
[Color:0x5]somewhere in the bay area[Color:0x0]. I want you to find
and rescue these women and capture or kill
whoever's responsible.
[END]
1: ダミー
